title: Good Morning, Monster
author: Catherine Gildiner
subline: Five heroic stories of emotional recovery.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A therapy-couch silhouette in the upper 2/3, with 5 patients sitting up on it (as stick figures). One of them is RED, the 'most in pain' patient. The therapist is the hairline figure facing them. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 600)" fill="none">
    <!-- The therapy couch: a long horizontal rounded rectangle -->
    <rect x="120" y="400" width="1360" height="80" rx="40" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- The couch backrest (a small bump at the left) -->
    <path d="M 120 400 Q 80 380 80 340 L 80 460 Q 80 480 120 480" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- 5 patients on the couch, sitting up (head + body) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2.5">
      <g transform="translate(280 380)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-40" x2="0" y2="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="-30" y2="10"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="30" y2="10"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(540 380)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-40" x2="0" y2="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="-30" y2="10"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="30" y2="10"/>
      </g>
      <!-- Patient 3 — RED, the most distressed (the 'monster' of this story) -->
      <g transform="translate(800 380)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="22"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-38" x2="0" y2="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="-30" y2="10"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="30" y2="10"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1060 380)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-40" x2="0" y2="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="-30" y2="10"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="30" y2="10"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1320 380)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-40" x2="0" y2="20"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="-30" y2="10"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="30" y2="10"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- A small red label above the red patient: 'MONSTER' -->
    <text x="800" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.3em">MONSTER</text>
    <!-- A hairline line under the couch (the floor) -->
    <line x1="100" y1="520" x2="1500" y2="520" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- A speaker-icon at the top — speech-bubble representing 'good morning' -->
    <g transform="translate(800 80)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <rect x="-160" y="-60" width="320" height="120" rx="0"/>
      <path d="M 0 60 L 0 100 L 40 100 L 20 60 Z" fill="#0a0a0a"/>
    </g>
    <text x="800" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">"GOOD MORNING"</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A therapy-couch scene: 5 patients sit on a long rounded-rectangle couch (the classic shrink-couch silhouette), drawn as stick figures. The CENTER patient (#3) is RED — the one whose 'monster' is being addressed in this book. Above the couch, a large speech bubble with '"GOOD MORNING"' — the book's title line. The red patient is labeled 'MONSTER' in tiny red caps. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand '5 STORIES' in the top-left; pill 'MONSTER' at the top.
